markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce GrowthX's content strategy and services to Hasura, exploring potential collaboration for their AI-focused growth initiative.](https://fathom.video/share/2_x-yyAa-LpE7sHVo7bxC55RTtEyTwhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Hasura is pivoting from API-focused to AI-centric, requiring a robust content strategy to support this transition](https://fathom.video/share/2_x-yyAa-LpE7sHVo7bxC55RTtEyTwhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [GrowthX offers a comprehensive content strategy service, including an 8-week strategy sprint and ongoing content production](https://fathom.video/share/2_x-yyAa-LpE7sHVo7bxC55RTtEyTwhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
  - [The engagement model starts with a $20,000 strategy sprint, followed by a potential 12-month commitment based on mutual agreement](https://fathom.video/share/2_x-yyAa-LpE7sHVo7bxC55RTtEyTwhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)
  - [Hasura's current content approach lacks cohesion and struggles to address their evolving target audience](https://fathom.video/share/2_x-yyAa-LpE7sHVo7bxC55RTtEyTwhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)

## Topics

### Hasura's Business Pivot

  - [Shifting focus from API product to AI-centric offerings](https://fathom.video/share/2_x-yyAa-LpE7sHVo7bxC55RTtEyTwhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
  - [Deal cycle reduced from 12-18 months to 3-6 months](https://fathom.video/share/2_x-yyAa-LpE7sHVo7bxC55RTtEyTwhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [Average deal size increased from $60K to $300K+](https://fathom.video/share/2_x-yyAa-LpE7sHVo7bxC55RTtEyTwhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [Transitioning from inbound to outbound sales, aiming to return to inbound motion](https://fathom.video/share/2_x-yyAa-LpE7sHVo7bxC55RTtEyTwhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Purchased PromptQL.io/com domain for rebranding efforts](https://fathom.video/share/2_x-yyAa-LpE7sHVo7bxC55RTtEyTwhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)

### GrowthX's Content Strategy Approach

  - [Utilizes AI workflows to scale high-quality content production](https://fathom.video/share/2_x-yyAa-LpE7sHVo7bxC55RTtEyTwhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
  - [Employs a team of experienced editors, SEO specialists, and technical experts](https://fathom.video/share/2_x-yyAa-LpE7sHVo7bxC55RTtEyTwhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Offers a comprehensive "Content OS" for strategic planning and execution](https://fathom.video/share/2_x-yyAa-LpE7sHVo7bxC55RTtEyTwhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)
  - [Aims for daily content publication, significantly higher than typical 2-5 pieces per month](https://fathom.video/share/2_x-yyAa-LpE7sHVo7bxC55RTtEyTwhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
  - [Focuses on creating in-depth, AI-friendly content that performs well with LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/2_x-yyAa-LpE7sHVo7bxC55RTtEyTwhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

### GrowthX's Engagement Model

  - [8-week strategy sprint for $20,000](https://fathom.video/share/2_x-yyAa-LpE7sHVo7bxC55RTtEyTwhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)
  - [Includes company research, strategy development, style guide creation, and content calibration](https://fathom.video/share/2_x-yyAa-LpE7sHVo7bxC55RTtEyTwhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - [Proposes a 12-month commitment after the sprint, based on mutual agreement](https://fathom.video/share/2_x-yyAa-LpE7sHVo7bxC55RTtEyTwhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
  - [Flexible approach, sometimes recommending companies to implement strategy independently if not ready for full engagement](https://fathom.video/share/2_x-yyAa-LpE7sHVo7bxC55RTtEyTwhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

### Hasura's Content Challenges

  - [Current content strategy lacks cohesion due to managing two product lines](https://fathom.video/share/2_x-yyAa-LpE7sHVo7bxC55RTtEyTwhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
  - [Struggling to identify and target the right audience (technical vs. go-to-market)](https://fathom.video/share/2_x-yyAa-LpE7sHVo7bxC55RTtEyTwhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Need for a systematic approach to content creation and strategy](https://fathom.video/share/2_x-yyAa-LpE7sHVo7bxC55RTtEyTwhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1695.0)
  - [Difficulty in producing timely, relevant content for marketing initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/2_x-yyAa-LpE7sHVo7bxC55RTtEyTwhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send email with call recording and sample Statement of Work (SOW) by the next day](https://fathom.video/share/2_x-yyAa-LpE7sHVo7bxC55RTtEyTwhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)
  - [Schedule a follow-up call including Maurice's VP of DemandGen, Ellie](https://fathom.video/share/2_x-yyAa-LpE7sHVo7bxC55RTtEyTwhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
  - [GrowthX to create a shared Slack channel for ongoing communication](https://fathom.video/share/2_x-yyAa-LpE7sHVo7bxC55RTtEyTwhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [Coordinate potential kickoff dates for the strategy sprint, considering Maurice's upcoming paternity leave](https://fathom.video/share/2_x-yyAa-LpE7sHVo7bxC55RTtEyTwhQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1622.0)
